steps.title: Multiply both sides by y to isolate x
steps.content:
Starting with $b - 72 = \frac{x}{y}$, multiply both sides by $y$ to eliminate the denominator:

$$y(b - 72) = x$$

steps.title: Expand to express x in terms of b and y
steps.content:
Distribute $y$ on the left side:

$$x = by - 72y$$

That matches choice D — D is correct.
